notes: v380 — Added a private-access lock for this preview. When invite-only access is turned on, the app asks for a tester password the first time you open it; type it once and this device remembers it. The password is checked on the server, so only people who have it can load the app and its data. Nothing else changed — your saved data, signals and portfolio are untouched and work exactly as before. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to get this update.
